description: Style NoteCrafted with age old printing and dyeing traditions, each piece from fabindia is created by artisans from villages nestled in the green valleys of India. The brand considers ancient fabric weaving and dyeing techniques that are dying out and infuses them with new life by providing these craftsmen a viable market. This skirt is a unique piece fashioned to please not only those who love the simple life but also the style-consious global citizen. Product DetailsPurple A-line skirt with a concealed zipper on the side of the waistMaterial and CareCottonHand wash in cold waterUse mild detergentDry flat in shadeSizeRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
